risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Secure the Windows boot process' ve Microsoft Support 'Windows 11 and Secure Boot' belgelerinden alinmistir. Secure Boot UEFI sartidir; eski Legacy BIOS sistemlerde etkinlestirilemez. GPT disk gereklidir.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Secure the Windows boot process' and Microsoft Support 'Windows 11 and Secure Boot'. Secure Boot is a UEFI requirement; cannot be enabled on Legacy BIOS systems. GPT disk required.

prerequisites.tr: GPT disk (MBR'den GPT'ye donusum: mbr2gpt rehberine bakin)
prerequisites.en: GPT disk (MBR to GPT: see mbr2gpt guide)

body.tr: Microsoft Learn: 'Secure Boot is a security standard developed by members of the PC industry to help make sure that a device boots using only software that is trusted by the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM). It's part of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification.' Firmware her boot bileseninin imzasini kontrol eder - UEFI firmware drivers, EFI applications, OS bootloader, kernel.
body.en: Microsoft Learn: 'Secure Boot is a security standard developed by members of the PC industry to help make sure that a device boots using only software that is trusted by the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM). It's part of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification.' Firmware checks signature of every boot component - UEFI firmware drivers, EFI applications, OS bootloader, kernel.

title.en: Microsoft's Settings path (boot from Windows to UEFI)

body.tr: Microsoft Support: 'go to Settings, select System, choose Recovery from the list and select Restart now under Advanced startup. On the next screen, select Troubleshoot and choose Advanced options. Select UEFI Firmware Settings and choose Restart to make changes.'
body.en: Microsoft Support: 'go to Settings, select System, choose Recovery from the list and select Restart now under Advanced startup. On the next screen, select Troubleshoot and choose Advanced options. Select UEFI Firmware Settings and choose Restart to make changes.'

title.tr: Settings > System > Recovery > Advanced startup > Restart now
title.en: Settings > System > Recovery > Advanced startup > Restart now

title.tr: Recovery screen: Troubleshoot > Advanced options > UEFI Firmware Settings > Restart
title.en: Recovery screen: Troubleshoot > Advanced options > UEFI Firmware Settings > Restart
In UEFI Security/Boot tab, set 'Secure Boot' to Enabled

title.tr: Hata: 'Cmdlet not supported on this platform'
title.en: Error: 'Cmdlet not supported on this platform'

body.tr: Microsoft Q&A'lara gore bu mesaj Legacy BIOS modunu gosterir - Secure Boot etkinlestirilemez. Once mbr2gpt ile diski GPT'ye donusturup firmware'i UEFI mode'a alin (mbr2gpt rehberine bakin).
body.en: Per Microsoft Q&A this message indicates Legacy BIOS mode - Secure Boot can't be enabled. First convert disk to GPT via mbr2gpt and switch firmware to UEFI mode (see mbr2gpt guide).
